description.value:
Your gravitational field has strengthened, and your ability to manipulate objects within it has improved. Your gravitational field grants you two additional hands, following the rules for characters with more than two hands. The @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Switch Hands] action gains the novian trait when you switch to or from any of your gravity hands.

Special A novian with Extra Hands can select the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.All Hands on Deck] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Double Draw] standardized ancestry feats.
